events.summary: Palantir upgraded to Outperform from Neutral by Mizuho with $195 price target amid AI partnership and defense contract.

SanDisk filed Form S-3ASR to register resale of 7,513,019 common shares held by Western Digital following a debt-for-equity exchange completed June 9, 2025.
SanDisk fair value increased 396% due to severe storage commodity shortage from AI data center expansion.
Morningstar increased fair value estimate on SanDisk by 396% due to severe shortage of commodity-oriented storage products needed for AI data center capacity buildout.

Eaton, an industrial equipment manufacturer, is showing strong technical setups as industrials sector outpaces tech in early 2026.
